_comment: Source-of-truth list of repos that consume the DevAudit SDLC framework + should receive auto-filed bump issues when a new version publishes. Operator-maintained: add a repo when it onboards via `devaudit install` + survives its first release cycle; remove when it's stopped/paused for > 30d. The release.yml workflow reads this on every tag push.

active_consumers.notes: Hospitality/POS; primary consumer since 2026-03. Node + MongoDB. Highest velocity (~1 release/day).
Job board; secondary consumer since 2026-05. Node + Postgres.

_paused_consumers._comment: Consumers that onboarded but are currently stopped. NOT auto-issued. Move back to active_consumers when they resume.
